title: Zimbabwe vs India: Match Preview and Potential Debut
description: Search interest is high for the Zimbabwe vs India cricket series, with news outlets focusing on team strategies and a potential new fast bowler.

sources.title: Zimbabwe look to expose vulnerable India searching for winning formula
Chevrons take on the World Champions
Who is Ashok Sharma? Meet the 150-kph tearaway who could make his India debut in Zimbabwe

sections.heading: Match Preview
paragraphs: According to Cricinfo, the Zimbabwe team is looking to expose a vulnerable India side that is currently searching for a winning formula. This coverage is presented as a match preview for the 1st T20I.

sections.heading: Team Designations
paragraphs: Herald.co.zw refers to the Zimbabwe team as the Chevrons in their coverage. The same source identifies the Indian team as the World Champions ahead of their meeting.

sections.heading: Player to Watch
paragraphs: Sportstar has published a feature on Ashok Sharma, describing him as a '150-kph tearaway.' The report indicates that he could make his debut for India during the series in Zimbabwe.

faq.q: How is the Indian team described in the preview?
faq.a: Cricinfo describes India as vulnerable and notes that the team is searching for a winning formula.
According to Sportstar, Ashok Sharma is a fast bowler who bowls at 150 kph and could make his India debut in Zimbabwe.

news_coverage.title: Zimbabwe look to expose vulnerable India searching for winning formula
Chevrons take on the World Champions
Who is Ashok Sharma? Meet the 150-kph tearaway who could make his India debut in Zimbabwe
